ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled   4  5  3  4  The response shows context relevance and persona consistency but lacks a bit of naturalness in tone, slightly affecting overall quality. Short note: Good attempt at balancing elements; could enhance the flow for better engagement.

baseline_no_context             2  4  5  3  While consistent with no additional context provided, it misses on persona consistency and lacks naturalness in tone which impacts its overall quality negatively. Short note: Needs to incorporate more of the Old Merchant's talkative nature for authenticity.
